title: Holding It Together: 6-Week, In-Person Group Therapy in Leesburg

blocks.hero_title: Holding It Together: 6-Week In-Person Group Therapy in Leesburg
blocks.hero_subtitle: For the high-functioning adult moving from seamless performance to authentic connection.

blocks.body: You're the person everyone relies on. You anticipate needs, meet every deadline, and keep the motor running. But inside, the engine is, well, overheating. You're exhausted from the quiet pressure of always being *fine*. This is the place where you finally don't have to be.

blocks.title: The Journey

items.title: Weeks 1-2: Finding Your Feet (Grounding)
items.content: We start with the body. You’ll learn practical ways to notice the bouncing knee, tight chest, or antsy energy and bring yourself back to the present before the overwhelm takes over.

items.title: Weeks 3-4: The Power of the Pause
items.content: Thoughts, Emotions, and the Inner Critic

blocks.body: This group is a curated container for those ready to put insight into practice. It's likely a fit if you're looking for tools and community. It's **not** a fit if you're currently in active crisis, dealing with acute substance use, and/or unable to commit to the full 6-week cycle.

blocks.title: Program Details
blocks.body:
**Duration:** 6-week closed therapy group\
**Dates:** Tuesdays, May 6th - June 10th, 2026\
**Time:** 6 PM - 7:15 PM (75-minute sessions)\
**Location:** [In person at the Wildwood office](/contact)
**Cohort Size:** Small cohort (8 participants max.)
**Cost:** $495 for the complete 6-week program (superbills available for out-of-network benefits).

blocks.title: Is this the right fit for you?
blocks.body:
* Adults who appear high functioning but feel overwhelmed or numb inside
* People who support everyone else and struggle to receive support themselves
* Those experiencing anxiety, depression, burnout, and/or emotional disconnection
* Anyone tired of feeling alone in their healing and wanting real connection

*This is a trauma-informed, connection-based therapy group that meets in person in Leesburg, Virginia.*

blocks.title: Ready to put down the weight?
blocks.body:
$495 for the full 6-week journey. This includes weekly, 75-minute sessions, curated materials, and a 15-minute 1:1 screening call.

## This group is NOT for you if you:

* Are dealing with active substance abuse issues
* Are currently in a domestic violence situation
* Are in crisis mode from recent severe trauma
* Struggle with extreme emotional dysregulation that hasn't been addressed
* Tend to dominate conversations and can't tolerate being redirected
* Have significant untreated personality disorder symptoms
* Can't commit to the full 6-week program

*If you're unsure whether this is right for you, we'll determine this together on the screening call.*

seo_title: Holding It Together: 6-Week In-Person Group Therapy in Leesburg
